citati.text: You can't change someone. You can try to understand them, watch them, and listen to them. When you understand them, you can help them to change.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: There is only one way - follow your heart.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: Watch people carefully. You'll notice if someone is hiding something. Whether they want to or not, their behavior will give them away.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: Don't mindlessly resist other people's ideas. Try to understand them. Maybe they want to show you something that you don't notice yourself.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: If you notice people doing strange things, don't ask them how they did it because they won't tell you. Instead, observe them closely - the reason for their success is evident in their actions.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: You can't control everyone and everything, you can only control yourself. And that's more than enough.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: Never let others scare you. What they say is not true. They want to scare you into quitting, into telling them secrets... So never be scared. Instead, ask them a question they won't know the answer to. They will get scared and leave you alone.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: It doesn't matter how hard you are trying, there is always someone who is better than you. Don't compare yourself with others at any cost.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: If you try to win, you will lose everything you have. If you really want to win, you should give up all you have.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: One day you will help someone and you will be hurt very much because of helping others.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: Because you speak the truth, they will oppose you, they will shame you. But at all costs, speak and do what is right. Don't care what others think of you.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: You can't win a war. In a war, someone loses a lot and someone loses a little less (but both lose).
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: Most people will treat you as you treat them. They are like mirrors that reflect you.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: What you criticize most in others is actually what bothers you about yourself. Watch yourself.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: It is not important who you are. Important is what you do.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: Safety is an illusion. Growth lives in the unknown, because the greatest risks hide the brightest rewards.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: With patience, all "dragons" can be trained.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: You need to trust others, but not too much.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: You can't change what others do. But you can decide how to respond. Their actions are not your burden, they're your raw material.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: It's never too late!
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: Panic steals time and solves nothing. Stay calm, clarity is your strongest tool.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: Sooner is always better.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: It is all about trust.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: The most precious treasure is being loved.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: Expect the unexpected.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: Tomorrow is another day.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: Some things are more important than winning or being better than others.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: Our past is a shadow we cannot outrun. But when it catches up, we must stand tall and learn from its whispers.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: Sometimes the crazy way is the only way.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: Sometimes, the last person you want to rely on is the one you end up being stuck with.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: Most people are afraid of things because they don't understand them.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: Often, defense is the best offense.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: Having courage isn't the same as having no fear. It's being afraid and pushing forward anyway, whatever that means.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: They laughed at me because I'm different. I laugh at them because they're all the same.
citati.author: Kurt Cobain

citati.text: They may not realize it yet, but they need you.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: All are marked by a weakness... some just hide it better.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: There is nothing wrong with being upset. It just means that you care.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: Bad things happen when you try to beat others.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: Your phone has already replaced your watch, camera, calendar, and alarm clock. Don't let it replace your family!
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: Haters are a sign you're visible enough to matter.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: Every plan is better than no plan.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: If someone is captured for too long, they don't know how to be free anymore.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: Never say never.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: A group is only as strong as its weakest member.
citati.author: Carmel Sheridan

citati.text: You don't need to be great to start. But you need to start to be great.
citati.author: Zig Ziglar

citati.text: You can't predict your enemy's every move - but remember that there is a solution for every situation.
citati.author: Anonymous

citati.text: When you start looking at things differently, you start seeing things you didn't before.
citati.author: Wayne Dyer
